settings.heading: Find the right EZQuest product
settings.subheading: Browse by product family, then compare models or open support when you need more detail.

settings.heading: Choose the EZQuest product family for your setup.
settings.copy: Choose hubs, docks, power, or finishing pieces by the way the workflow actually needs to work.
settings.note: Use collections to narrow the right family first, then compare models or open support when you need more detail.
